    O

    onElementParsed(ParsingEvent) - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.config.IConfigEventListener
    Called when a configuration element has been parsed.
    onExecutionStarted() - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.IExecutionContextListener
    Invoked when program execution begins.
    onExecutionStopped() - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.IExecutionContextListener
    Invoked when the program execution stops.
    onExitCodeChanged(byte) - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.IExecutionContextListener
    Invoked when the program exit code changes.
    onFlagChanged(boolean, boolean, boolean) - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.IExecutionContextListener
    Invoked when the machine status flags change.
    onInputRequested() - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.IExecutionContextListener
    Invoked when input is requested.
    onMaxJumpsReached() - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.IExecutionContextListener
    Invoked when the maximum allowed number of jumps has been reached.
    onOutput(int) - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.IExecutionContextListener
    Invoked when the program produces an output value.
    onProgrammeCounterChanged(int) - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.IExecutionContextListener
    Invoked when the programme counter changes.
    onRegisterChanged(int, int) - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.IExecutionContextListener
    Invoked when the value of a register changes.
    opcode() - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.compilation.compiling.ICompiledInstruction
    Returns the opcode for this instruction.
    opcode() - Method in record class dk.tij.registermaschine.api.config.ConfigInstruction
    Returns the value of the opcode record component.
    OpCode - Variable in class dk.tij.registermaschine.api.instructions.AbstractInstruction
    Opcode identifying this instruction.
    OPERAND - Enum constant in enum class dk.tij.registermaschine.api.compilation.compiling.OperandConcept
     
    OperandConcept - Enum Class in dk.tij.registermaschine.api.compilation.compiling
    Describes the semantic role of operand within an instruction.
    operands() - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.compilation.compiling.ICompiledInstruction
    Returns the compiled operands associated with this instruction.
    operands() - Method in record class dk.tij.registermaschine.api.config.ConfigInstruction
    Returns the value of the operands record component.
    OperandType - Enum Class in dk.tij.registermaschine.api.compilation.compiling
    Defines how the value of an operand is interpreted during execution.
    output() - Method in record class dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.ExecutionSnapshot
    Returns the value of the output record component.
    output(int) - Method in interface dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.IExecutionContext
    Sends a value to the program output
    overflow() - Method in record class dk.tij.registermaschine.api.runtime.ExecutionSnapshot
    Returns the value of the overflow record component.
